prompt:
Use case: background-extraction
Asset type: foreground action overlay for the water-relay scene
Input images: Image 1 is the approved style reference only
Primary request: one complete sweeping arc of opaque pale-blue paper-cut water splash with several rounded droplets, energetic but simple and readable
Style/medium: layered torn rice-paper collage matching Image 1
Composition/framing: wide low arc with all droplets fully visible and generous padding
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat uniform solid #00ff00 chroma-key, no texture, shadow, gradient, floor or reflection
Constraints: opaque paper shapes only, no transparency inside water, no people, no buckets, no text, no logo, no watermark; do not use #00ff00 in subject
